name: architecture-first
description: Stack-agnostic dual-lens plugin for Claude Code: architect and cleaner think simultaneously on every non-trivial change. Forces situation → plan → structure → code; detects hotspots; plans safe decompositions; identifies and batches deletions with safety levels L1-L4. Universal across NestJS, Next.js, Express, Spring, Laravel, Django, FastAPI, Rails, Go, Rust.
